data.title: Milestone Systems Announces AI Built for Security Operations, Powered by Real-World Security Data
data.description: In Copenhagen, Denmark on March 19, 2026, Milestone Systems, a prominent international provider of data-driven video technology, introduced advanced AI and analytics tools. These innovative solutions empower security teams to effectively implement generative AI technologies. Among the new offerings are AI Search, Video Summarization, and Video...

data.title: Stellantis Expands 2026 Drive for Design Contest
data.description: In Auburn Hills, Michigan, a design contest has launched on March 19, 2026, encouraging students to envision the future of Street and Racing Technology (SRT) vehicles. The 2026 Drive for Design Junior competition, larger and more daring than before, is now welcoming entries from U.S. students. This includes the chance for students to showcase their creativity and design skills for the chance to win.

data.title: WYNN NIGHTLIFE EMBRACES "THE YEAR OF EXCESS" WITH CINEMATIC SHORT FILM FEATURING TOP DJS
data.description: Wynn Nightlife, the premier nightlife brand of Wynn Las Vegas, has announced an impressive lineup of music artists including Calvin Harris, The Chainsmokers, Marshmello, Diplo, Mau P, Hugel, Kaskade, ODESZA (DJ Set), and SOFI TUKKER. They will be joined by renowned Hollywood actor Rob Riggle at the event. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on March 19, 2026. Other incredible performers are also set to join the lineup. For the video download link, refer to the source.
